title: ICH Guidelines
description: International Council for Harmonisation — regulatory guidelines for pharmaceuticals

tools.name: search-guidelines
tools.description: Search ICH guidelines by topic, code, or keyword

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Guideline category: Q (Quality), S (Safety), E (Efficacy), M (Multidisciplinary)

tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will search ICH guidelines database for matching documents."}

tools.name: get-guideline
tools.description: Get ICH guideline summary and current step by code

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: ICH code (e.g., E2A, E2B, E2C, E2D, E2E, S7B, M1)

tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will extract guideline metadata, current step, and implementation dates from ICH database."}

tools.name: get-pv-guidelines
tools.stub_response: {"guidelines": ["E2A: Clinical Safety Data Management", "E2B(R3): ICSRs Electronic Transmission", "E2C(R2): PSURs", "E2D: Post-Approval Safety Data Management", "E2E: Pharmacovigilance Planning", "E2F: Development Safety Update Report"], "status": "stub"}

tools.name: get-meddra-guidelines
tools.description: Get MedDRA-related ICH guidelines and terminology references
